name: Zucchini and Walnut Sour Cream Pancakes
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine the milk, sour cream, eggs, and melted butter. Mix thoroughly.
2. Add the baking mix and stir until just combined.
3. Add the grated zucchini and chopped walnuts.
4. Pour the batter onto a lightly grilled griddle or frying pan set to 400 degrees.
From the Kenniston Hill Inn in Booth Bay, Maine.
Source: San Diego Union Tribune, Nov 3, 1994.
